name: ScreenCloud
tagline: Simple, powerful digital signage for any screen
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage CMS with enterprise security, remote device management, and 80+ app integrations. Used by 10,000+ screens worldwide.
longDescription: ScreenCloud is a cloud-based digital signage platform that makes it easy to create, schedule, and manage content across any screen. Features include drag-and-drop content creation, 80+ integrations (Slack, Google, Power BI), enterprise-grade security with SSO, remote device management, and real-time content updates. Supports Android, Chrome OS, Fire TV, and proprietary players.

name: BrightSign
tagline: The global market leader in digital signage media players
shortDescription: Industry-leading solid-state media players for digital signage. Purpose-built hardware with BrightAuthor:connected cloud platform for content management.
longDescription: BrightSign is the global market leader in digital signage media players, offering the most reliable, secure, and cost-effective players available. Their product line ranges from entry-level HD players to 8K-capable units. BrightAuthor:connected provides cloud-based content creation, scheduling, and device management. Supports HTML5, video, live TV, and interactive touch.

name: Rise Vision
tagline: Free digital signage software for schools and businesses
shortDescription: Open-source digital signage platform with a generous free tier. Popular with schools and small businesses for digital menu boards, directories, and announcements.
longDescription: Rise Vision offers free digital signage software that runs on Chrome OS, Windows, and Raspberry Pi. Features include hundreds of free templates, real-time data widgets (weather, RSS, social media), scheduling, and remote management. The platform is especially popular in education, with dedicated school templates and Google Workspace integration.

name: Samsung Business Displays
tagline: Professional displays for every digital signage application
shortDescription: Full range of commercial displays from video walls to outdoor signage. Built-in Tizen SoC media player with MagicINFO content management platform.
longDescription: Samsung's commercial display division offers a comprehensive lineup including indoor LED signage, outdoor displays, video walls, interactive displays, and transparent OLED. The built-in Tizen System-on-Chip eliminates the need for external media players. MagicINFO provides enterprise content management with scheduling, remote monitoring, and device management.

name: LG Business Solutions
tagline: Commercial displays with webOS and SuperSign software
shortDescription: Professional display solutions including LED, OLED, and transparent displays. webOS built-in platform with SuperSign CMS supporting up to 1,000 screens.
longDescription: LG Business Solutions delivers commercial-grade displays with built-in webOS platform. SuperSign CMS supports content creation, scheduling, and management for up to 1,000 displays. Product line includes standard signage, OLED, transparent OLED, ultra-stretch, outdoor, and LED. ProCentric for hospitality offers hotel TV and guest-facing solutions.

name: Mvix
tagline: Award-winning cloud-based digital signage software
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage CMS with 500+ templates, data integrations, and AI-powered content scheduling. Trusted by Fortune 500 companies.
longDescription: Mvix offers an award-winning cloud-based digital signage platform used by schools, corporate offices, retail stores, hospitals, and manufacturing facilities worldwide. Features include 500+ templates, drag-and-drop editor, data-driven content with 100+ integrations, AI scheduling, interactive touch support, and SCORM-compliant training content.

name: NoviSign
tagline: Easy-to-use digital signage software platform
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage with drag-and-drop content creation, real-time widgets, and multi-screen management. Android and Chrome OS compatible.
longDescription: NoviSign provides an intuitive cloud-based digital signage solution that simplifies content creation and management. Features include a drag-and-drop editor with rich media support, real-time widgets (weather, social media, calendars), playlist scheduling, and remote device monitoring. Supports Android media players, Chrome OS, and Windows.

name: Scala
tagline: Enterprise digital signage and digital experience platform
shortDescription: End-to-end digital signage platform combining content management, media playback, data integration, and analytics for enterprise deployments.
longDescription: Scala, a STRATACACHE company, delivers an enterprise-grade digital experience platform for creating, managing, and measuring digital signage networks. Features include content management with workflow approval, data-triggered content, audience measurement analytics, and multi-zone interactive layouts. Deployed in 100+ countries across retail, corporate, healthcare, and transportation.

name: Signagelive
tagline: Cloud-native digital signage platform
shortDescription: Enterprise cloud digital signage with multi-platform support, proof of play reporting, and API-first architecture for custom integrations.
longDescription: Signagelive is a cloud-native digital signage platform supporting Samsung Tizen, LG webOS, BrightSign, Chrome OS, and Windows players. Features include content scheduling, proof-of-play reporting, multi-site management, API integrations, and SCORM support. Used by enterprises across retail, hospitality, corporate, and healthcare sectors.

name: Yodeck
tagline: Easy and affordable digital signage for any business
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage with free plan for one screen. Raspberry Pi powered with 200+ templates, remote management, and easy setup.
longDescription: Yodeck offers affordable cloud-based digital signage powered by Raspberry Pi. The platform includes 200+ free templates, a drag-and-drop editor, app integrations (YouTube, weather, social media), playlist scheduling, and remote device management. Free plan covers one screen, making it ideal for small businesses testing digital signage.

name: SpinetiX
tagline: Swiss-engineered digital signage technology since 2006
shortDescription: End-to-end digital signage with hardware media players, cloud CMS, and content authoring software. 20 years of Swiss engineering innovation.
longDescription: SpinetiX is a Swiss digital signage pioneer celebrating 20 years of innovation. They deliver a complete end-to-end solution including HMP (Hyper Media Player) hardware, ARYA cloud CMS, and Elementi content authoring software. Known for reliability and security, SpinetiX players run an embedded OS with no moving parts.

name: Broadsign
tagline: The leading out-of-home advertising platform
shortDescription: Enterprise digital out-of-home (DOOH) platform for managing large-scale signage networks with programmatic advertising, campaign management, and analytics.
longDescription: Broadsign is the leading platform for digital out-of-home advertising, managing over 1.5 million signs worldwide. Features include programmatic ad buying via Broadsign Reach, campaign management with Broadsign Direct, content distribution, proof of play, and audience analytics. Primarily serves large DOOH networks, transit authorities, and media companies.

name: Four Winds Interactive (FWI)
tagline: Visual communications for the modern workplace
shortDescription: Enterprise visual communications platform for workplace signage, wayfinding, room scheduling, and employee engagement across corporate campuses.
longDescription: Four Winds Interactive (FWI) is an enterprise visual communications platform designed for corporate environments. Features include digital signage, interactive wayfinding, room and desk booking displays, corporate communications, and visitor management. Integrates with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and workplace management systems.

name: Poppulo
tagline: The Harmony platform for workplace communications
shortDescription: Digital signage and employee communications platform with 4,500+ enterprise customers. Combines digital signage, email, mobile, and intranet channels.
longDescription: Poppulo (formerly Omnivex + Four Winds) provides the Harmony platform for omnichannel workplace communications. The platform unifies digital signage, email, mobile push, and intranet into a single communications hub. Features include content management, audience targeting, analytics, and integrations with HR systems. Serves 4,500+ enterprise customers globally.

name: CrownTV
tagline: Digital signage made simple
shortDescription: All-in-one digital signage solution with proprietary media player, cloud dashboard, and 200+ apps. White-glove installation available nationwide.
longDescription: CrownTV provides a turnkey digital signage solution including proprietary media players, cloud-based content management dashboard, and 200+ content apps. Features include content scheduling, multi-location management, real-time updates, and 200+ integrations. Offers white-glove installation services across the United States.

name: Navori Labs
tagline: AI-powered digital signage and analytics
shortDescription: Swiss-made digital signage software with AI-powered content triggering, audience analytics, and computer vision for real-time content adaptation.
longDescription: Navori Labs delivers AI-powered digital signage software from Switzerland. Their QL platform features computer vision audience analytics, AI-driven content triggers (demographic, weather, time), automated content optimization, and multi-zone interactive layouts. AQUAJI analytics provides anonymous audience measurement for measuring engagement and ROI.

name: Kitcast
tagline: Digital signage for Apple TV and any screen
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage platform built for Apple TV with support for Android, Amazon Fire TV, and web players. Easy setup in minutes.
longDescription: Kitcast is a cloud-based digital signage platform with native Apple TV support. Features include drag-and-drop content editor, 40+ app integrations, playlist management, remote device monitoring, and multi-location management. Supports Apple TV, Android TV, Amazon Fire TV, and web-based players.

name: Planar
tagline: Extraordinary visual experiences for any environment
shortDescription: Premium commercial displays including direct-view LED, LCD video walls, touch screens, and transparent OLED. A Leyard company.
longDescription: Planar, a Leyard company, manufactures premium commercial display solutions for digital signage. Product line includes DirectLight LED video walls, Clarity Matrix LCD video walls, ultra-narrow bezel displays, touch screen displays, and transparent OLED panels. Known for high brightness, reliability, and 24/7 operation capability.

name: NEC Display Solutions
tagline: Professional display solutions for every application
shortDescription: Commercial displays, projectors, and LED solutions for digital signage. Part of Sharp NEC Display Solutions with global enterprise support.
longDescription: Sharp NEC Display Solutions offers a comprehensive range of commercial displays, projectors, and direct-view LED for digital signage applications. Features include 24/7 rated panels, built-in SoC computing, OPS slot for modularity, and NaViSet management software. Global enterprise support and extended warranties available.

name: Arreya
tagline: Cloud digital signage for Chrome and Android
shortDescription: Simple cloud-based digital signage for Chrome OS and Android devices. Real-time content updates, templates, and multi-screen management.
longDescription: Arreya is a cloud-based digital signage platform designed for Chrome OS and Android devices. Features include real-time content updates, HTML5 templates, multi-screen management, scheduling, and Google Workspace integration. Particularly popular in education and small business deployments.

name: Look Digital Signage
tagline: Manage your signage from anywhere
shortDescription: Cloud CMS for digital signage with support for Android, Chrome OS, Linux, and Windows. Data-driven content with real-time integrations.
longDescription: Look Digital Signage provides a cloud-based CMS for managing digital signage content across Android, Chrome OS, Linux, and Windows players. Features include data-driven content with real-time integrations, multi-zone layouts, scheduling, device monitoring, and proof-of-play reporting.

name: TouchSource
tagline: Digital directories and wayfinding solutions
shortDescription: Turnkey digital directory and wayfinding solutions for commercial real estate, healthcare, and hospitality. Interactive kiosks with managed services.
longDescription: TouchSource specializes in digital building directories and wayfinding solutions. Products include lobby directories, interactive wayfinding kiosks, elevator displays, and event signage. Offers fully managed services including content updates, hardware monitoring, and on-site installation. Serves commercial real estate, healthcare, and hospitality markets.

name: Friendlyway
tagline: Digital signage and visitor management platform
shortDescription: Cloud-based platform combining digital signage, interactive kiosks, visitor management, and wayfinding for corporate and retail environments.
longDescription: Friendlyway provides a cloud-based platform that combines digital signage with visitor management and wayfinding. Features include interactive touch kiosks, digital reception, room booking displays, corporate communications, and analytics. Serves corporate campuses, retail, and public spaces.

name: Spectrio
tagline: Customer engagement technology solutions
shortDescription: Full-service digital signage and customer engagement company offering hardware, software, content creation, and managed services for multi-location businesses.
longDescription: Spectrio is a full-service customer engagement technology company offering digital signage, on-hold messaging, overhead music, Wi-Fi marketing, and scent marketing. Their digital signage solution includes hardware, cloud CMS, content creation services, and ongoing managed support. Serves multi-location franchises, healthcare, and hospitality.

name: Visix
tagline: Digital signage for campus and workplace
shortDescription: Digital signage solutions for higher education, corporate, and government campuses. Room signs, wayfinding, event boards, and emergency alerts.
longDescription: Visix provides digital signage solutions specifically designed for campus environments. Products include AxisTV Signage Suite CMS, EPS room signs, interactive wayfinding, event boards, and emergency alert integration with CAP/IPAWS. Serves higher education, corporate, government, and healthcare campuses.

name: REACH Media Network
tagline: Cloud-based digital signage made easy
shortDescription: Cloud digital signage with 150+ templates, data integrations, and white-label options. Strong presence in education, corporate, and healthcare.
longDescription: REACH Media Network provides cloud-based digital signage software with 150+ templates, data integrations (EHR, PMS, LMS), and white-label partnership options. Features include content scheduling, multi-screen management, interactive touch support, and emergency alert integration. Serves education, corporate, healthcare, and hospitality markets.

name: Daktronics
tagline: The world leader in LED video displays
shortDescription: Large-format LED display manufacturer for outdoor advertising, sports venues, and transportation. Custom display solutions with Venus content management.
longDescription: Daktronics is the world leader in large-format LED video displays, manufacturing systems for outdoor advertising billboards, sports venues, transportation hubs, and large-scale commercial installations. Venus content management software provides scheduling, content creation, and network management. Also offers indoor LED and LCD solutions.

name: Legrand AV (Chief/Da-Lite/Vaddio)
tagline: AV infrastructure and mounting solutions
shortDescription: Professional AV mounting, enclosures, and infrastructure from Chief, Da-Lite, and Vaddio brands. Industry standard for digital signage installation hardware.
longDescription: Legrand AV brings together Chief (mounts and racks), Da-Lite (projection screens), and Vaddio (AV over IP) brands. Chief is the industry standard for digital signage mounting solutions including wall mounts, ceiling mounts, kiosk enclosures, video wall mounts, and outdoor enclosures. Essential infrastructure for any signage deployment.

name: Mood Media
tagline: Elevating the customer experience
shortDescription: In-store media solutions including digital signage, background music, scent marketing, and AV systems for retail and hospitality brands.
longDescription: Mood Media is a global leader in in-store media solutions, serving 500,000+ commercial locations worldwide. Services include digital signage content and management, background music (Mood:Media), scent marketing, AV design and installation, and on-hold messaging. Provides end-to-end managed services for multi-location retailers and hospitality brands.
